untranslatable_reason: Cup-with-Handle is a visual/pattern-based formation requiring detection of: (1) cup formation with two bottoms separated by specific time duration (64 days), (2) handle formation with down-sloping trend line, and (3) breakout above handle trend line. These require pattern recognition algorithms not available in the allowed indicator set. The target price calculation uses a proprietary 'Measure rule' (Table 13.8) that cannot be expressed with standard technical indicators. Substituted with generic moving average crossover as approximation, but this is NOT equivalent to the original pattern-based signal.
translation_notes: Original signal describes a classic Cup-with-Handle charting pattern from technical analysis. Entry condition approximated as price crossing above SMA-20 with volume confirmation. Exit approximated as crossing below SMA-20. Actual pattern requires manual or ML-based pattern detection. Volume higher on right bottom noted but cannot be specifically coded without multi-candle comparison logic. Target calculation method (Measure rule) is author-silent and not implementable with available indicators.
